title: Section 93
content: No municipal officer or other municipal employee shall undertake any work unconnected with his duties under this Act except with the permission of 1[2[the Corporation]].
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “a Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
